name: 翌朝の実家前の道
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Photorealistic cinematic establishing environment for chapter 3 talk 2. Show the road outside Sato's family home on a crisp early-April morning in Kirifuse: narrow residential lane, low stone walls, modest garden edges, pale cold sunlight, packed travel mood before leaving, clear local sky, the sense of a quiet departure after an overnight stay, no readable text or obvious threat. Final delivery will be cropped to 1920x1080. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins and leave enough side information for widescreen composition. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, combat, action pose, readable text, collage, split panel, heavy crowd, obvious threat
